channel.title: Webflow-Blog on Daily Tech Articles Feed
channel.description: Recent content in Webflow-Blog on Daily Tech Articles Feed

item.title: Introducing the Adobe Marketo Engage App for Webflow
item.description:
Source: Webflow Blog

Read full article

item.title: Turn your Webflow CMS content into eye-catching charts
item.description: Transform your Webflow CMS content into dynamic charts! 📊 This article provides a step-by-step guide on how to integrate interactive charts into your Webflow site. It covers the tools and methods needed to visualize data effectively. Enhance your website’s engagement and make your content stand out. 🌟 #Webflow #DataVisualization #WebDevelopment #InteractiveCharts

item.title: Webflow acquires Vidoso.ai to deploy AI agents that work within your brand, not outside it
item.description: 🚀 Webflow has acquired Vidoso.ai to enhance its marketing platform with AI agents. Vidoso.ai will introduce brand-aware visual and video generation, allowing businesses to create content that aligns closely with their branding. This integration aims to streamline marketing efforts directly within the Webflow ecosystem. #Webflow #VidosoAI #MarketingTechnology #AI #Branding

item.title: Same title, different job: How AI rewrote the SEO playbook
item.description: SEO specialists are evolving from traditional page optimization to developing systems that secure AI citations. This shift requires a new skill set and understanding of platform capabilities that drive successful AI integration. Stay informed on how these changes impact the SEO landscape! 💻🔍 #SEO #AI #DigitalMarketing #Innovation #ContentStrategy

item.title: Agent skills: What, why, and Webflow
item.description: Discover how Webflow is integrating generative AI skills to enhance user experience! 🤖 The article explores the importance of these skills and how they support Webflow’s mission to empower users. Learn about the innovative tools being developed to streamline workflows and improve design capabilities. Stay informed and see how technology is shaping the future of web design! 🌐✨ #Webflow #GenerativeAI #UserExperience #WebDesign #Innovation

item.title: From audit to impact: How AI-powered SEO and AEO is accelerating organic growth
item.description: Discover how Webflow’s AI-powered SEO and AEO tools are transforming the landscape of organic growth. 🌱 These innovative tools streamline the optimization process, reducing the need for manual adjustments and enhancing efficiency. As a result, businesses can focus more on driving impactful results. Learn more about this shift in digital marketing strategies! 🔍✨ #SEO #AEO #DigitalMarketing #Webflow #OrganicGrowth

item.title: How top agencies are reimagining their revenue models with Webflow
item.description: Agencies are evolving their revenue models by shifting away from traditional hourly billing. With Webflow, they are implementing subscriptions, retainers, and performance-based pricing. This approach enables them to offer more flexible and innovative services to clients. Discover how these changes are shaping the future of agency work. 💼✨ #Webflow #AgencyGrowth #RevenueModels #DigitalMarketing #Innovation

item.title: From tagline to experience: Transforming Vizcom’s homepage with motion and intention
item.description: 🌐 OFF+BRAND has redefined Vizcom’s homepage by integrating motion design and WebGL. This transformation turns a standard product demo into an immersive experience, enhancing user engagement. The design focuses on intentionality, making the homepage more dynamic and interactive. Explore the innovative approach that elevates digital experiences. #MotionDesign #WebGL #UserExperience #DigitalTransformation #Vizcom

item.title: The future of billable hours: How agencies are redefining value
item.description: Agencies are moving beyond traditional billable hours to redefine how they deliver value. They’re focusing on productivity and finding new ways to measure success. Platforms like Webflow are emerging as tools to enhance revenue growth opportunities. Stay updated on these industry shifts! 🌐💼📈 #AgencyGrowth #WebMarketing #Productivity #Webflow #BusinessTrends

item.title: Creating API wrappers with Webflow Cloud
item.description: 🚀 Explore the basics of creating API wrappers using Webflow Cloud! This article serves as a primer for developers looking to connect with external APIs. It outlines the steps involved in building an API wrapper or proxy, enhancing integration capabilities. Learn how to streamline your projects and improve functionality with Webflow Cloud. #Webflow #APIs #Development #TechTips #Integration

item.title: Embed Storylane product demos in Webflow with iframe code
item.description: 🚀 Learn how to seamlessly integrate Storylane product demos into your Webflow site! This article guides you through using iframe code and custom code elements for embedding. It also covers how to incorporate analytics to track performance. Enhance your website’s interactivity with these simple steps! #Webflow #ProductDemos #Storylane #WebDevelopment #Analytics

item.title: Build community event platforms in Webflow using Eventbrite for ticketing and registration
item.description: 🚀 Looking to build community event platforms? This article discusses how to integrate Eventbrite ticketing with Webflow. It covers options like embed widgets, middleware, and custom APIs for seamless event registration. Enhance your platform’s functionality and streamline the ticketing process! 🎟️ #Webflow #Eventbrite #EventPlanning #TechIntegration #CommunityEvents

item.title: Build usage-based billing systems for SaaS platforms in Webflow using Stripe
item.description: Unlock the potential of usage-based billing for your SaaS platform! 💡 This article explores how to connect Webflow with Stripe’s metered billing APIs using serverless middleware. This integration allows for flexible pricing based on actual usage, enhancing customer satisfaction and revenue management. Discover the steps to implement this system effectively. 📈 #SaaS #Webflow #Stripe #Billing #TechIntegration

item.title: How to build a membership platform with Supabase and Webflow
item.description: 🚀 Learn how to build a membership platform using Supabase and Webflow! This article explains how to connect Webflow to Supabase, enabling OAuth authentication for secure logins. It also covers implementing Row Level Security policies for data protection and incorporating real-time updates for an enhanced user experience. Discover the steps to create a seamless membership site. #WebDevelopment #Supabase #Webflow #MembershipSites #TechTutorials

item.title: How to Build Service Business Booking Flows in Webflow Using Elfsight Widgets
item.description: Discover how to effectively use Elfsight booking widgets in Webflow! This article guides you through the steps of embedding these widgets, including setup and configuration. It also covers calendar synchronization and troubleshooting tips to ensure smooth operation. Enhance your service business with these useful tools! 📅💻✨ #Webflow #Elfsight #BookingWidgets #ServiceBusiness #TechTips

item.title: How high-growth teams use Lokalise to launch multilingual Webflow sites faster
item.description: Unlock the potential of your multilingual Webflow sites with Lokalise! 🌐 Lokalise seamlessly integrates with Webflow to automate localization, allowing teams to launch sites faster. This integration helps businesses scale globally by utilizing AI-powered workflows. Explore how high-growth teams are streamlining their processes for effective global reach. 🚀 #Localization #Webflow #Lokalise #GlobalBusiness #AIWorkflows

item.title: Scaling Beyond Vertical Limits: Sharded Data Migrations at Webflow
item.description: Webflow recently completed a zero-downtime migration of hundreds of millions of documents. This move is aimed at achieving horizontal scalability. The migration process was designed to ensure that users experienced no interruptions during the transition. This significant upgrade allows Webflow to manage data more efficiently and support future growth. #Webflow #DataMigration #TechUpdate #Scalability #Engineering 🚀📈🔧

item.title: Webflow meets Claude: Design, structure, and manage sites right from Claude
item.description: 🚀 Exciting news for Webflow users! You can now design pages and manage CMS content directly from Claude, thanks to a new first-party connector powered by MCP. This integration simplifies the process of building and managing websites. Streamline your workflow and enhance your design experience with this powerful tool! #Webflow #ClaudeIntegration #WebDesign #CMS #MCP

item.title: Build a subscription membership site with Stripe, Auth0, and Webflow Cloud
item.description: 🚀 Looking to build a subscription membership site? This article provides a comprehensive guide using Stripe, Auth0, and Webflow Cloud. It covers how to create secure e-learning platforms and manage gated content effectively. Key focus areas include authentication and integration with Vimeo for enhanced user experience. Explore the possibilities for your online learning community! 📚🔐 #Webflow #Elearning #MembershipSite #Stripe #Auth0

item.title: Build e-learning platforms with gated content with Vimeo and Webflow
item.description: Unlock the potential of e-learning! 📚 This article provides a comprehensive guide on creating secure e-learning platforms using Vimeo and Webflow. It covers how to implement gated content and authentication features effectively. Learn the steps to enhance your online education offerings. #ELearning #Webflow #Vimeo #GatedContent #OnlineEducation

item.title: How to build trust and credibility for service businesses in Webflow with Trustpilot badges
item.description: Boost your service business credibility in Webflow by adding Trustpilot badges! 🌟 This guide covers how to integrate TrustBox widgets effectively, enhancing your site’s performance and trustworthiness. It also includes details on using schema markup to optimize your setup. Learn how to build trust with your audience today! 🔍💼 #Webflow #Trustpilot #BusinessGrowth #Trust #CustomerEngagement

item.title: Build sites that scale with Webflow's AI site builder
item.description: 🚀 Webflow introduces an AI site builder that enables users to create structured, multi-page websites from a single prompt. This tool is designed with scalability in mind, making it easier for businesses and individuals to expand their online presence efficiently. Explore how this innovation can streamline your web development process! 🌐 #Webflow #AISiteBuilder #WebDevelopment #TechInnovation

item.title: Using on-device AI to enhance Webflow CMS content
item.description: Unlock the potential of your Webflow CMS with Chrome’s new on-device AI features! This innovative technology helps enhance your website content progressively, making it more engaging for users. Explore how these advancements can improve your site’s performance and user experience. #Webflow #AI #ContentManagement #TechInnovation #WebDevelopment 🌐🤖✨

item.title: Build Webflow experiences that convert in every market
item.description: Unlock the potential of your Webflow projects! 🚀 Smartling provides tools for Webflow teams to create localized experiences. This approach enhances user engagement, builds trust, and boosts conversions across diverse global markets. 🌍 Discover how localization can transform your outreach and effectiveness. 📈 #Webflow #Localization #Smartling #DigitalMarketing #UserEngagement

item.title: Moving away from Webflow’s legacy Editor
item.description: 📢 Webflow is phasing out its legacy Editor. The article highlights the deprecation timeline and outlines migration details for users. It also provides resources to assist with the transition. Stay informed to ensure a smooth shift to the new platform! #Webflow #EditorMigration #WebDevelopment #TechUpdate

item.title: Webflow's next-gen CMS: Now available for Enterprise
item.description: Webflow’s Enterprise sites have transitioned to a new CMS architecture. This upgrade enhances content scale, offers richer data models, and provides increased design flexibility. These developments aim to improve user experience and capabilities for enterprise-level projects. 🌐📈💻 #Webflow #CMS #Enterprise #WebDesign #TechUpdate

item.title: Why partnerships matter: Ways GlobalLink collaborations simplify multilingual content delivery
item.description: GlobalLink for Webflow streamlines multilingual content delivery through effective partnerships. 🤝 These collaborations enhance efficiency and foster innovation, making it easier to manage global content. Explore how integrating GlobalLink can benefit your multilingual strategies. 🌍✨ #GlobalLink #MultilingualContent #Partnerships #Webflow #ContentDelivery

item.title: Build a marketing automation hub in Webflow using Zapier for cross-tool workflows
item.description: 🚀 Build an efficient marketing automation hub with Webflow and Zapier! This article guides you on connecting Webflow forms to email platforms, CRMs, and analytics tools. Discover how to streamline your workflows using Zapier’s capabilities for better integration and performance. #MarketingAutomation #Webflow #Zapier #DigitalMarketing #WorkflowOptimization

item.title: Introducing Google Ads for Webflow: The AI-driven way to grow smarter and faster
item.description: 🚀 Exciting news for Webflow users! Google Ads is now integrated with Webflow, enabling faster campaign launches and smarter optimization. This AI-driven tool helps businesses reach audiences across Google Search, YouTube, and more. Take advantage of this feature to enhance your marketing strategy! #GoogleAds #Webflow #DigitalMarketing #AI #BusinessGrowth

item.title: Welcome to the next era of the Webflow Community
item.description: 🌐 The Webflow Community is evolving! The latest updates highlight new community spaces, innovative programs, and increased funding opportunities. These changes aim to enhance collaboration and support among members. Stay tuned for exciting developments that will strengthen connections and foster creativity! #Webflow #Community #Innovation #Collaboration #Funding

item.title: Build corporate websites with Weglot and Webflow
item.description: 🌐 Discover how to effectively build corporate websites using Weglot and Webflow. Weglot’s multilingual integration allows for seamless translation of your Webflow site, making it accessible to a global audience. This combination enhances user experience and expands your market reach. #Webflow #Weglot #Multilingual #WebDevelopment #GlobalBusiness

item.title: Build exclusive creator communities with Memberstack memberships and Webflow CMS
item.description: Unlock the potential of exclusive communities! 🌐 The article explores how to build membership sites using Webflow CMS combined with Memberstack. This integration allows creators to manage memberships effectively and engage their audience. Discover how to create a seamless experience for your community today! 💡 #Webflow #Memberstack #MembershipSite #CreatorCommunity #WebDevelopment

item.title: Build SaaS marketing sites in Webflow using Figma design systems
item.description: Transform your SaaS marketing site by integrating Figma design systems with Webflow! 🌐 The article outlines how to effectively sync design tokens, components, and CSS variables for a seamless workflow. This process allows for a more cohesive design experience. Unlock the potential of your designs and streamline your site development! 💻✨ #SaaS #Webflow #Figma #DesignSystems #WebDevelopment

item.title: Integrate Shopify Storefront APIs with Webflow CMS to Build Scalable Content-Driven Commerce Sites
item.description: Unlock the potential of your e-commerce business! This article discusses how to integrate Shopify’s Storefront APIs with Webflow’s CMS. This combination allows for the creation of scalable, content-rich shopping experiences through a headless architecture. Learn how to unify Shopify’s commerce capabilities with Webflow’s visual tools for high-performance sites. #Ecommerce #Shopify #Webflow #ContentMarketing #HeadlessCommerce 🛍️💻📈

item.title: SoDA: Building an agency network from scratch
item.description: 🌍 SoDA highlights how Siberia is transforming its agency network to meet client needs effectively by 2026. The article outlines the strategic restructuring efforts aimed at enhancing service delivery and responsiveness. This proactive approach reflects a strong commitment to adapting to market demands. #AgencyNetwork #BusinessStrategy #ClientNeeds #Siberia #Adaptation

item.title: SoDA: Case study: Why productization is the future of digital Services
item.description: Productization is emerging as a key strategy in digital services, challenging the notion that “faster = cheaper.” The article explores how this approach emphasizes quality and value over speed, encouraging businesses to rethink their service models. By focusing on productized solutions, companies can enhance customer satisfaction and drive sustainable growth. #DigitalServices #Productization #BusinessStrategy #CustomerSatisfaction #SustainableGrowth 📈💼✨

item.title: SoDA: How to bend and not break
item.description: In the article “SoDA: How to bend and not break,” the focus is on prioritizing your Most Important Things (MITs) to achieve success. It discusses strategies for maintaining flexibility while pursuing goals, emphasizing the importance of adaptability in challenging situations. The piece encourages readers to identify their MITs and allocate resources effectively to navigate obstacles. Learn more about effective prioritization! 📈💡 #Prioritization #SuccessStrategies #Adaptability…

item.title: SoDA: How to drive revenue without the constraint of time
item.description: 🚀 Discover how to scale your agency with productized business models! This article explores strategies to drive revenue efficiently, emphasizing the importance of creating standardized services. By streamlining processes, agencies can operate without time constraints. Learn how to implement these methods for sustainable growth. #AgencyGrowth #ProductizedServices #BusinessModel #RevenueStrategies #Efficiency

item.title: SoDA: The agency evolution: Why now is your opportunity to win the AI Era
item.description: The article discusses the evolving role of agencies in the AI era. It emphasizes the importance of becoming strategic partners for clients to leverage new technologies effectively. Agencies are encouraged to adapt their strategies and offerings to meet changing client needs. This shift presents an opportunity for growth and innovation. Explore how your agency can thrive in this AI-driven landscape! 🤖✨ #AgencyEvolution #AI #StrategicPartnerships #Innovation #DigitalTransformation

item.title: SoDA: The billion-dollar SaaS playbook agencies can borrow
item.description: Unlock the secrets of the billion-dollar SaaS playbook! 💼 This article outlines strategies agencies can adopt from successful SaaS companies. It highlights the importance of subscription models, customer retention, and data-driven decision-making. Agencies can leverage these insights to enhance their service offerings and grow their revenue. 📈 #SaaS #AgencyGrowth #BusinessStrategy #Innovation

item.title: SoDA: Why the new web requires a dual strategy for experience design
item.description: In the digital landscape, a dual strategy for experience design is essential. This approach helps tackle the ongoing challenge of making content easily discoverable. By focusing on user experience and content optimization, brands can improve visibility and engagement. Stay ahead in the evolving web environment! 🌐✨ #ExperienceDesign #ContentStrategy #DigitalMarketing #UserExperience #WebDevelopment

item.title: SoDA: The end of extraction: Building agencies for the age of intelligence
item.description: 🌐 The article “SoDA: The End of Extraction” discusses the evolution of agencies in the era of intelligence. It highlights the importance of integrating human and artificial intelligence as key resources. The focus shifts from traditional extraction methods to utilizing intelligence for agency growth and innovation. Explore how this transition can redefine the future of business. 🤖💡 #AgencyEvolution #ArtificialIntelligence #HumanIntelligence #Innovation #BusinessStrategy

item.title: Writing effective prompts for the Webflow MCP
item.description: Unlock the potential of the Webflow MCP Server! 🚀 This article offers practical tips for writing effective prompts that streamline design and content workflows. It emphasizes how automation can enhance productivity and efficiency in your projects. Explore the resources provided to optimize your use of the Webflow MCP. #Webflow #Automation #DesignWorkflow #ContentCreation

item.title: Build an event registration system with Webflow and Mailchimp
item.description: 🌐 Looking to streamline your event registration process? This article details how to connect Webflow forms to Mailchimp. You can efficiently manage event sign-ups with tag segmentation and automated confirmation emails. Learn how to enhance your registration system for a smoother experience! #Webflow #Mailchimp #EventRegistration #Automation #TechTips

item.title: Build custom feedback portals with UserVoice API and Webflow
item.description: 🔧 Discover how to integrate UserVoice with Webflow to build custom feedback portals! The article outlines the use of a secure API proxy, OAuth 2.0, webhooks, and CMS syncing to enhance user engagement and feedback collection. This integration can streamline your feedback process effectively. #UserVoice #Webflow #FeedbackPortals #Integration #WebDevelopment

item.title: Build scalable client campaign workflows in Webflow with HubSpot integration
item.description: 🚀 Discover how to enhance your client campaign workflows! This article explains how to connect Webflow forms to HubSpot CRM, enabling you to build scalable and efficient processes. Learn the steps to streamline your marketing efforts and improve client management. #Webflow #HubSpot #MarketingAutomation #ClientManagement #WorkflowOptimization

item.title: Embed UserVoice feedback widgets in Webflow
item.description: 🚀 Discover how to enhance your Webflow projects by embedding UserVoice feedback widgets! This guide explains the process of using JavaScript for seamless client-side feedback and idea voting. It’s a practical way to engage your users and gather valuable insights. Learn the steps and elevate user interaction! 🗳️💻 #Webflow #UserFeedback #JavaScript #WebDevelopment #UserVoice

item.title: How to implement Hotjar analytics on Webflow e-commerce sites
item.description: Unlock the potential of your Webflow e-commerce site by implementing Hotjar analytics. 📊 This article guides you through using session recordings, heatmaps, and conversion funnels to understand user behavior and improve site performance. Discover how these tools can enhance your customer experience and drive sales. #Webflow #Hotjar #Ecommerce #Analytics #UserExperience

item.title: How developers are building in Webflow with code components
item.description: Discover how developers are leveraging code components in Webflow to create unique custom React experiences. From integrating 3D effects to designing audio players, the possibilities are expanding. These tools enable more dynamic web applications and enhance user interaction. Explore the innovative ways developers are pushing boundaries! 🌐💻✨ #Webflow #React #WebDevelopment #CodeComponents #Innovation

item.title: Es oficial: Webflow llega a la Argentina
item.description: 🌟 Webflow has officially launched in Argentina! 🇦🇷 This platform aims to empower users to build and design websites with ease. The launch signals exciting opportunities for creativity and innovation within the region. Stay tuned for more updates as Webflow looks forward to collaborating with the local community! #Webflow #Argentina #WebDesign #Innovation #TechNews

item.title: It’s official: Webflow is opening an office in Argentina
item.description: 🌟 Exciting news from Webflow! We are pleased to share that Webflow is opening a new office in Buenos Aires, Argentina. This location will serve as a hub for engineers, designers, and the wider community. Stay tuned for more updates on how we aim to foster collaboration and innovation in this vibrant city! 🌍✨ #Webflow #BuenosAires #OfficeOpening #Community #Innovation

item.title: Beyond the prompt: Why successful AI localization requires a strategy
item.description: Successful AI localization goes beyond simply using tools as they come. To achieve accurate and scalable multilingual content, it’s essential to develop a strategic approach. This ensures that your AI solutions effectively meet specific localization needs. Explore how to enhance your Webflow content with tailored AI strategies. 🌍🤖 #AILocalization #Webflow #ContentStrategy #MultilingualContent #DigitalMarketing

item.title: Meet the team: How curiosity and community brought Jon Saxton to Webflow
item.description: Meet Jon Saxton, a Senior Solutions Architect at Webflow. His journey from a dedicated Webflow builder to a key team member highlights the importance of curiosity and community. In his story, Jon emphasizes how these values shaped his professional path and led him to join the Webflow team. 🌟 Discover more about his experiences and insights in the full article! #Webflow #TeamSpotlight #Curiosity #Community #CareerJourney

item.title: Building brand-aware global websites: LILT’s enterprise AI strategy
item.description: LILT is revolutionizing how Webflow marketers approach global revenue. 🌍 By combining custom AI with expert verification, they ensure that brand integrity is maintained while expanding reach. This approach empowers marketers to effectively build brand-aware global websites. Learn more about LILT’s enterprise AI strategy! 🤖💼 #GlobalMarketing #AI #BrandIntegrity #Webflow #DigitalStrategy

item.title: Expose your Webflow CMS with a simple API
item.description: Unlock the potential of your Webflow projects! The article discusses how the integration of Webflow Cloud with the CMS API allows developers to share Webflow content through a tailored API. This combination enhances flexibility and accessibility for developers looking to customize their content sharing. Explore new possibilities for your projects! 🌐✨ #Webflow #CMS #APIDevelopment #WebDevelopment #TechTutorial

item.title: 8 web design trends to watch in 2026
item.description: 🌐 Exciting changes are on the horizon for web design in 2026! Key trends include innovative text effects and a vibrant use of color. The influence of AI is reshaping design capabilities, leading to heightened audience expectations. Stay ahead of the curve and explore these emerging trends! 🎨✨ #WebDesign #DesignTrends #AI #2026Trends #DigitalInnovation

item.title: The AEO voices to watch in 2026
item.description: Discover the AEO’s influential voices to watch in 2026! 📢 This article highlights key figures shaping the marketing landscape. These voices offer valuable insights and trends that every marketer should consider. Stay informed and connected with these leaders as they guide the industry forward. #MarketingTrends #AEO #InfluentialVoices #2026Insights #MarketingLeadership

item.title: Announcing the 2025 Webflow Awards winners
item.description: 🌟 Announcing the 2025 Webflow Awards winners! This annual event celebrates the creativity and innovation within the Webflow community. The awards highlight individuals and organizations making significant contributions to web experiences. 🏆 Community Educator of the Year: Timothy Ricks, known for his impactful educational resources. 🏆 Community Creator of the Year: Ilja van Eck, recognized for his award-winning projects and contributions to the design community. Explore the full list of…

item.title: How leading agencies are navigating the new era of brand storytelling
item.description: 🌐 Modern businesses face a challenge: delivering content across diverse platforms. A recent panel with industry leaders explored this evolving landscape of brand storytelling. Key insights included the necessity of creating modular content systems and mapping content types to audience preferences. Agencies must shift to treat content as integral to brand identity. Collaboration is also changing, with agencies becoming creative partners to clients, ensuring mutual respect and clear roles for…

item.title: Motion design isn’t just eye candy; it’s UX infrastructure
item.description: Motion design is transforming user experience (UX) by enhancing both function and feel. Today’s web users expect dynamic, responsive interfaces. Motion design helps communicate messages quickly, making interactions clearer and more engaging. For instance, using scroll-triggered animations can effectively highlight key features. Recent studies emphasize that smooth animations enhance user satisfaction and decision-making. Tools like LottieFiles for Webflow simplify the integration of…

item.title: Form follows function: Building resilient form submissions at scale
item.description: Webflow is enhancing its system resiliency to ensure reliable form submissions, crucial for businesses. Key features include: - Durability: Submissions are preserved even during database failures. - Non-blocking: Recovery mechanisms do not slow down requests. - Idempotent: Submissions can be safely replayed without duplicates. The process involves write-ahead backups stored in Amazon S3, allowing for both targeted and global replay of submissions during outages. #Webflow…

item.title: Balancing trust, access, and control on Webflow Enterprise
item.description: Webflow Enterprise addresses the challenges of managing access in a world of numerous applications. With enterprises handling over 300 apps, effective Identity and Access Management (IAM) is crucial to prevent security risks. Webflow integrates IAM into its platform, ensuring secure user onboarding, authentication, and access monitoring. This holistic approach allows teams to collaborate freely while maintaining IT oversight and compliance. Automated provisioning and deprovisioning support…

item.title: Leading design through disruption: A conversation with Sara Vienna, Chief Design Officer at Metalab
item.description: 🚀 Excited to share insights from my conversation with Sara Vienna, Chief Design Officer at Metalab! Sara reflects on her journey from a cold email to leading a top design firm. She emphasizes flexibility and continuous improvement in a rapidly evolving tech landscape. AI is reshaping design, prompting a redefinition of craft that focuses on user needs over time spent. Client expectations have also shifted, with heightened pressure on businesses to adapt. #DesignLeadership #AIinDesign…

item.title: How to win AEO with content
item.description: 🚀 The landscape of brand discovery is changing with AI-driven search. A recent Webflow study reveals only 25% of marketing professionals understand Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), despite 93% of CMOs recognizing its future importance. Focusing on four key pillars—content, technical, authority, and measurement—can help brands thrive. AEO emphasizes moving from keyword-centric content to personalized answers that meet buyer needs. This evolution is crucial for long-term visibility and growth….

item.title: Introducing The Webflow Way: Best practices to help you build with confidence
item.description: 🚀 Introducing The Webflow Way! This new resource offers best practices to help teams maximize their use of the Webflow platform. It focuses on six key areas: Design Systems, CMS, SEO, Localization, Optimization, and Collaboration. These guidelines aim to enhance efficiency, improve site performance, and support global reach. Perfect for teams striving to achieve ambitious goals! 🔗 Explore the Webflow Way today! #Webflow #BestPractices #WebDevelopment #DigitalMarketing #Collaboration

item.title: Introducing The Webflow Way: Best practices to help you build with confidence
item.description: 🚀 Introducing The Webflow Way! This new resource offers best practices to enhance your experience on the Webflow platform. It focuses on key areas: Design Systems, CMS, SEO, Localization, Optimization, and Collaboration. Learn how to build scalable, high-performing web experiences that drive results for your business. 🔗 Explore the Webflow Way today! #Webflow #BestPractices #WebDesign #Marketing #BusinessGrowth

item.title: ROI of websites: Metrics that matter to the C-suite
item.description: Understanding the ROI of websites is crucial for marketing leaders. While they focus on metrics like conversion and engagement, C-suite executives prioritize ROI and revenue impact. Traditional metrics often fall short, as they do not align with executive goals. For effective buy-in, it’s essential to connect website performance to business outcomes. Key metrics such as conversion rate, customer acquisition cost, and customer lifetime value resonate with executives, highlighting the real…

item.title: How to choose between a blog, resource center, and content hub for maximum impact
item.description: Choosing the right content structure is crucial for business success. 📊 Many companies lack a clear content strategy, leading to poor user experiences and lost sales. Research shows that 82% of consumers abandon purchases due to this issue. Understanding the differences between blogs, resource centers, and content hubs can enhance lead generation and SEO. A blog focuses on timely, engaging content, while a resource center offers actionable resources. Content hubs provide organized, evergreen…

item.title: Color and typography pairings: A designer’s cheatsheet
item.description: Designing an effective website starts with two key elements: color and typography. 🎨✍️ These choices are interconnected and can significantly impact user perception and emotional response. Colors elicit feelings quickly, while typography conveys your brand’s personality. For instance, finance sites use deep blues and clean fonts to communicate trust, while creative agencies opt for bold colors and unique typefaces. Accessibility is crucial; poor contrast can hinder readability for users with…

item.title: A look at our roadmap: shipping for resiliency, security, and performance
item.description: 🚀 We’re committed to enhancing Webflow’s platform for our users. Following a recent incident, we’ve taken steps to improve resiliency, security, and performance. Key investments are underway to strengthen our systems and ensure reliability. 🌐 Our hosting now leverages Cloudflare’s global network, enhancing speed and protection against threats. 🔧 Additionally, we’re re-architecting our CMS to better meet the growing needs of our users. Stay tuned for more updates! #Webflow #TechUpdates #CMS…

item.title: MCP servers worth knowing if you're building with AI
item.description: 🚀 Exploring MCP servers is essential for AI development! These servers help integrate structured context into AI models, crucial for building advanced tools like agents and code assistants. The article highlights various MCP servers, especially Context7, which is optimized for codebases and offers access to numerous open-source libraries. Cursor IDE makes integration straightforward, enhancing workflow efficiency across platforms. For developers, understanding these tools can streamline…

item.title: A data-driven approach to building better user journeys with Webflow Analyze
item.description: Unlock the potential of your website with Webflow Analyze! 🌐 This tool empowers web teams to access user behavior data directly within their design workflow. Understanding user journeys—from first click to conversion—can lead to significant increases in demo requests and revenue. Learn how to analyze visitor touchpoints to enhance engagement and reduce bounce rates. Discover a three-step roadmap for optimizing user journeys and driving better results. 📈 #WebDesign #UserExperience #DataDriven…

item.title: The marketer’s guide to LLM search terms: From SEO to AEO
item.description: SEO strategies are evolving due to the rise of AI in search. 🌐 Today, 55% of users rely on AI search for general research, often receiving direct answers on results pages without visiting websites. Marketers need to adapt by understanding new terms like AIO, GEO, and LLMs, which shape this AI-first search landscape. Learn how to optimize your content for a changing digital environment. 📊✨ #DigitalMarketing #SEO #AI #SearchTrends #MarketingStrategy

item.title: July 28 Incident report: Service availability disruption
item.description: Webflow faced service disruptions from July 28-31, impacting the Designer, Dashboard, Marketplace, and user sign-ups. While hosted sites remained operational, core functionalities were affected. The incident involved multiple phases of malicious attacks leading to elevated latency and outages. Mitigation efforts included firewall protections and database optimizations. Full stability was restored through configuration changes and adopting a more efficient CPU architecture. For a deeper…

item.title: Webflow’s availability incident: what we got wrong and what we’re changing
item.description: Webflow faced a significant service disruption on July 28, caused by a malicious attack that affected customer access. The team worked quickly to stabilize the platform. CEO’s reflections highlight shortcomings in communication and support during this incident. Immediate changes include enhanced monitoring, improved infrastructure, and proactive customer updates. Webflow is committed to making the platform more reliable and transparent moving forward. #Webflow #ServiceUpdate #CustomerSupport…
